# misp_organisation (Data Source)

Look up a MISP organisation by id or uuid.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_organisation" "admin" {
  id = "1"
}

output "admin_name" {
  value = data.misp_organisation.admin.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Numeric id or uuid to look up.

### Read-Only

- `contacts` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `local` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `nationality` (String)
- `restricted_to_domain` (List of String)
- `sector` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `uuid` (String)
